subcodes.first_line: O ye servants and handmaidens of the All-Merciful! Jinab-i-Aqa Nurullah and Jinab-i-Aqa Muhammad Tabrizi have penned a letter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بندگان و اماء رحمان جناب آقا نورالله و آقا محمد تبریزی نامه ای مرقوم نموده
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for teaching, @unity; oneness of humanity
